programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force offers a "fountain of youth" to the vain and dictatorial widow (guest star Ruth Roman) of the late president of a small South American country in order to depose her.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bag of sand, which he takes to the back yard, where he adds it to his sand table. Lady Elaine Fairchilde is not impressed with the art creations made by the others and appoints herself judge of the festival.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers creates a replica of Trolley out of dough. Lady Elaine is not impressed with Neighbor Aber's artwork, but King Friday finds it inspirational. Daniel Tiger is sad because Lady Elaine has criticized his artwork.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets a musician playing a glass harmonica. Dr. Platypus practices his bagpipes with Handyman Negri on guitar and King Friday on the bass violin.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: It's the Neighborhood of Make-Believe Arts Festival, and all the neighbors are finding their own ways to express themselves. Mister Rogers encourages his "television friends" to appreciate the wide variety of art!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a pretzel factory to see how people make pretzels. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday and Queen Sara have an argument, which worries Prince Tuesday. He runs away to the home of his friend Daniel Tiger.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a garage where electric cars are being made, and he takes one out for a drive. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Handyman Negri organizes a search for Prince Tuesday, and the unhappy Prince is finally found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes on an airplane and visits with the pilot and flight attendant, who show him around the plane to help children feel more familiar when traveling by air.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches former Pittsburgh Steeler wide receiver Lynn Swann practice ballet with a dance company. He tells Mister Rogers how dancing has helped him play football. Lynn Swann also visits the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday announces the winner of the “Draw The Neighborhood” contest and awards a very unusual prize to everyone -- a rainbow. Mister Rogers shows a video of how real gold is processed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a ventriloquist's dummy he played with as a child. Bob Dog falls and is hurt. They take him to the hospital. King, Friday, prohibits play. Mister Rogers says play is important in learning to manage feelings.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: When King Friday outlaws play, Lady Elaine moves her Museum Go-Round to an entirely new location. She finds herself in a place where play is welcome—a play park, where she meets Barbara Russell.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses scissors and talks about safety. Lady Elaine tells Officer Clemmons she won't return to the Neighborhood until King Friday changes his rule against play. Lou Schreiber, Johnny Costa, and Joe Negri play music together.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a cave. Lady Elaine won't return until the no-play rule is changed. King Friday removes the ban when he realizes his fanfare cannot be played.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers walks on stilts and talks about how long it took him to learn to walk on them. Bob Dog persuades Lady Elaine Fairchilde to return to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mister Rogers talks about different ways of playing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how a player piano works. Corney's latest shipment of rocking chairs has been made with half pretzel parts. Mister Rogers talks about how important it is to do things well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a doll factory. Corney makes King Friday dolls. Lady Elaine is jealous. Mr. McFeely show Mister Rogers a swimming doll. Mister Rogers says he will take us to where he swims.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to visit ice skating star Peggy Fleming, who is practicing for an ice show. They talk about how doing anything well takes a lot of practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make blankets. Lady Elaine convinces Corney to manufacture only rocking chairs. Mister Rogers talks about why children are sometimes punished.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits his friend Adelia Moore to see how she makes stuffed animals for her children. In the Neighborhood of Make- Believe, the Neighbors are making presents for Ana Platypus' birthday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how spoons are made. King Friday demands that Lady Aberlin and Robert Troll create a mountain beside the castle. Mary Alice Sherred makes music with spoons.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a juniper tree. Everyone is covering the Eiffel Tower with trees. Queen Sara falls off the tower and is taken to an emergency room. Mister Rogers shows an emergency room.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a small kitten that belongs to Chuck Aber. Mister Rogers shows a film about seat belts. King Friday wants to see a mountain opera.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make towels. The Neighborhood of Make-Believe is hosting the Make-Believe Olympic Games. Lady Elaine will only agree to play if she is guaranteed to win the games.

programme.title: Extraterrestres de las profundidades

programme.title: Extraterrestres en la URSS
programme.desc: Misterios alienígenas sin resolver de la Unión Soviética: incidente del Paso Dyatlov, milagro de Petrozavodsk, caso Voronezh. Asombro y miedo, pero duda de la participación alienígena.

programme.title: Extraterrestres entre nosotros: la teoría de Michael Wolf
programme.desc: Michael K. Wolf comparte 30 años de ideas sobre ovnis, extraterrestres, proyectos gubernamentales y círculos de las cosechas.

programme.title: Fotografías auténticas de un extraterrestre: el caso Caponi
programme.desc: La historia de Caponi es uno de los testimonios más famosos de encuentros cercanos del tercer tipo con extraterrestres en todo el mundo. En estos, Caponi tomo cinco fotos que han sido confirmadas como reales.

programme.title: Hopkinsville: Los duendes extraterrestres
programme.desc: Una familia lucha contra alienígenas goblins durante una noche. Una lucha que terminó siendo para detener una invasión alienígena. Sin embargo, no olvidemos que el miedo es lo que mueve las acciones del hombre.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Descubre el mítico archipiélago de las Cícladas del Sur. Visite la isla de Amorgos, donde se filmó la película de culto "The Big Blue", Santorini, que está cubierta de lava negra enfriada, y Naxos, la isla de Dionisio.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Conocida como la capital de la felicidad de Brasil, Salvador da Bahía ofrece una variedad de mercados. Aquí, Tony participa en una ceremonia tradicional local y experimenta los talentos culinarios del famoso artista de la cocina bahiana: el chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué es un carioca? Los nativos son adorables bribones que encuentran formas de evitar el trabajo, prefiriendo la playa, coqueteando, frecuentando restaurantes y bares. Tony, bajo la tutela de un carioca ejemplar, prueba el estilo de vida.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Únete a Tony en su búsqueda del bar perfecto en Nueva York. Descubra la composición química correcta de las bebidas, las alegrías de los bares de mala muerte y la necesidad de aperitivos a altas horas de la noche.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Desde su época de adversarios peligrosos hasta cazadores colonialistas, hasta los desafíos actuales y considerables de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Esta historia descubre el fascinante mundo de los escarabajos de estiércol y sus incansables esfuerzos como algunos de los trabajadores más duros de la naturaleza.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: En medio de un viaje, la camioneta de Mónica Muñiz se descompone, quedando varada en algún punto de México. Al saber que su arreglo tomará varios días, decide recorrer los alrededores y llega a Tlacotalpan.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Luego de afirmar que el quedarse varada es una buena idea, Mónica Muñiz toma el transporte público para llegar a Catemaco, cuna de los brujos y tegogolos, y donde descubrirá la cultura de este pueblo mágico.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Siguiendo con su viaje, Mónica Muñiz busca una hormiga voladora que se puede comer, no sin antes recorrer un pueblo lleno de aventuras como tirolesa y pinturas rupestres.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Cerca de su destino anterior, Mónica Muñiz llega a Coscomatepec, población de excelentes artesanos en talabartería y telares. Sin embargo, su verdadero reto será tratar de subir el pico de Orizaba.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Luego de su intento fallido por subir el Pico de Orizaba, Mónica Muñiz llega a la zona cafetalera. Ahí conoce el mole tradicional, una fiesta patronal y el café de altura.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Muy cerca de Xico, nos encontramos con Coatepec, primer pueblo mágico de Veracruz y nuevamente la gastronomía hace gala del lugar. Desde el pan artesanal, hasta un banquete en el faro del Cerro de la Serpiente.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: En esta ocasión, Mónica Muñiz decide ser extrema y se dirige a Jalcomulco para conocer su río. Allí se pueden hacer diferentes actividades como tirolesa, rapel y rafting.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Mónica Muñiz conoce La Antigua, el primer pueblo fundado en Mesoamérica por parte de Hernán Cortés, y decide recorrer sus rincones, su historia y su basta y deliciosa gastronomía.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Jerusalén es una ciudad santa para judíos, cristianos y musulmanes, y cada uno tiene su piedra sagrada aquí: el Muro de los Lamentos, la Piedra del Santo Sepulcro y la Roca debajo de la famosa cúpula de oro.

programme.desc: Clint wants his wife's girlfriend, Anna, to back off! Next Kelly's husband pleads with her to take him back. But Kelly's mind is made up, she's staying with her husband's brother!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sherry is furious with her ex-best friend Kim who seduced her son Nick. Then, Angie confronts her husband Dale's lover Bobbie who tries to come between them!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Today Mark will be forced to choose between his lover, Amy, and his wife. Next Michelle is here to dump her lover for her ex-boyfriend, Frankie. Later, Erikka lives with her boyfriend but her heart belongs to her friend, Larry.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tracy and Allen have been living in a car. Her two older sisters are here to convince her to temporarily live with them and go back to school until he can provide for them.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Shannon's sister, Margie, has been cheating with Shannon's fiance! Next Robert is about to learn that his new wife has been having a secret affair. Later Damon and Shanna just had a baby, but he's worried because Shanna is here to tell him a secret.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dan is here today to beg Heather to give him another chance. Next Ginny wants Tim back and says that he still calls her. Later Shenidia is furious that another women is trying to steal her boyfriend of 4 years, Gary.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Today, Vicki will face her husband Jason and his lover with an ultimatum and Anna admits she’s trying to steal Misty’s husband – again!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Pimp Hotlanta will set Nika straight about their relationship. Stephanie confronts her pal Erika for having sex with her man. Gloria was crushed when she found out that her sister stole her man.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Michael cheated on his wife Alecia with a stripper who may now be pregnant. Sarah confronts a stripper named Amy who she says slept with her man. Missy is here to lay down the laws of the strip club.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Broderick has been an exemplary father to his 5 children, all of whom he's had to raise alone because their mother Renita abandoned them. They refuse to watch their youngest brother BJ grow up motherless and want Renita to wake up!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Marquis's horrible behavior stems from Sherita's alleged cheating. He even doubts he fathered their twins. Scott denies he fathered his wife's Anabel's sons because his brother Junior said he slept with her, but later denied the confession.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Don y Amy contrataron a Jessica para cuidar a su hijo, Steven. Años más tarde, Jessica dice que Steven es el padre de su hijo. Además, Marisol ha hecho 16 pruebas de ADN para encontrar al padre de su hijo. ¿La prueba número 17 será la definitiva?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de hacer 5 pruebas de ADN, Rebecca regresa con 2 hombres más para encontrar al padre de su nuevo bebé. Después, Don y su esposa se alegraron al descubrir que su hijo no era el padre del bebé de Jessica, pero ella cree que Don es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury está celebrando las fiestas contando cuentos junto a la chimenea. Compartirá las historias de los antiguos invitados que vinieron a hacerse pruebas de paternidad, al detector de mentiras y más. ¡Averigua si estos invitados han sido buenos o malos!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Dashawn y su mamá afirman que lo de Monica fue una aventura de una sola vez y que él no puede ser el padre de su bebé. Entonces, April quiere averiguar quién es el padre de su bebé. Después, ¿Frederick o Jason es el padre del bebé de Marietta?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Danica, una nueva mamá, recibió 5 correos electrónicos diferentes de 5 mujeres asegurando que se acostaron con su novio, Jimmy, en su casa. Entonces, ¿el novio de Renee preferirá su adicción a su familia?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Shenik y Shenequa aparecieron en el programa de Maury el año pasado después de una prueba de ADN. ¿Pero ahora Shenik se acuesta con el novio de su hermana? Además, lo único que se interpone son los resultados de la prueba del detector de mentiras.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Es Cortney el padre de los hijos de Brittany? Según su hermana, Brittany fue infiel con su prometido Clifton. Después, Melissa afirma que su ex-marido no es el padre de sus gemelos y que es Sean! ¿Lo confirmarán los resultados del ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Waldo se niega a ser el padre del bebé de Chelsea por su piel clara. Después, Kianna encontró fotos de mujeres desnudas en el teléfono de Nick y condones y colonia en su bolso de gimnasio. ¿Qué dirán los resultados del detector de mentiras de Maury?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Infieles, infieles y más infieles! El episodio de hoy de MAURY está lleno de drama, asombro y tentación. ¡Estos invitados simplemente no saben controlar sus acciones ante una tentación y se encuentran en un grave problema con sus parejas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de meses de rogar y suplicar, Latoya perdonó a Justice por su infidelidad. ¡Pero ahora han vuelto para someterlo a juicio por lo mismo! Después, puede que James sea demasiado bueno para ser verdad…

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia le forma un escándalo a Rosaura en pleno hospital. Iván cuenta la historia de su mamá y de su hermana pero sin decir nombres. Karina y María Julia siguen divirtiéndose en Orlando.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Las fotos presentadas a Luis Mario, por Eva, lo hacen creer en lo que le está diciendo, que Rosaura lo engaño con Julián. Rosaura le cuenta a Samuel lo que le pasó con Julián y el fotógrafo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia lee la carta donde Anselmo le dice a Rosaura que busque a su abuela y que no se quede con María Julia. Gabriel nuevamente se le declara a Eva y ella se burla de él. Él la besa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia le pregunta a Rosaura como debe llamarla, si Gabriela o Rosaura. Ella le comenta que se cambió el nombre para que los Arismendi no supieran más de ella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia está decidida a no darle el divorcio a Luis Mario. Suena el teléfono y es Patricio. Luis Mario y Gabriel se van al spa a pasar un rato. Patricio amenaza a Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia le cuenta a Rosaura por petición de Samuel quienes son las impostoras. María Julia y Karina están en el parque de diversiones de Orlando.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario sale del carro y busca a Rosaura. Luisana toma la pistola y dice que con ella si podría matar definitivamente a Camelia, ya que ella no hará feliz a Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia presiona a Eva para que le diga si efectivamente Luis Mario se enamoró de Rosaura, pero ella no se lo confirma y en cambio la amenaza con hacerle saber a Luis Mario el secreto de su vida.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia abraza a Luis Mario y le exige que vuelvan a ser la pareja feliz de antes, ya que ella lo quiere recuperar. Karina se fastidia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Eva discuten por Rosaura, cuando llega Luisana. Eva descarga su mal humor con ella y cuando Luis Mario se aleja, la amenaza con botarla de la casa por Eduarda y Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le cuenta todo a doña Cruz. Doña Cruz ofrece su ayuda para que Rosaura se pueda vengar de los que le hicieron daño. Camelia y Luis Mario están haciendo el amor.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Iván le informa a Rosaura que Luis Mario está muy grave. Despues, Rosaura quiere ir donde Luis Mario. Griselda le cuenta a María Julia lo que está pasando en la casa con Rosaura.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hordy's men keep attacking, but the Straw Hats have new weapons at their disposal! Franky unleashes the fury of the Black Rhino, and Luffy turns the tables on Hordy with a little help from his Kraken!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky dazzles Usopp and Chopper by transforming into a gigantic fighting robot, Hordy tries to blackmail the Kraken, and Luffy introduces his fist to the Fish-man's face!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy shows off even more new powers as he brutally pummels Hordy, but the main attraction proves to be an ancient and immense pirate ship that's heading straight for Fish-Man Island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shirahoshi summons the courage to risk everything to save her world, Luffy puts his own life in peril by venturing into the ocean, and Hordy's devious nature fully comes to the surface.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy sets the stage for a final battle with Hordy, Sanji kicks a giant in defense of Nami's honor, and Zoro puts his blades to the ultimate test against a steroid-powered fighting fish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy and Shirahoshi try to prevent Fish-Man Island from being crushed, the rest of the Straw Hats square off against the meanest Fish-Man Pirates in the deep blue sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is the only one who can stop Hordy, but he'll need air to survive the fight, so Shirahoshi's big brother risks his own life in a heroic attempt to get Luffy a bigger bubble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the rest of the Straw Hats continue to fight bravely, Luffy tries to find a way to save the island, and the horrible truth about Hordy's hatred for humans is finally revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hordy's twisted past takes center stage in a Fish-Man flashback. Meanwhile, Shirahoshi's brother begs Luffy to save his beloved homeland and wipe out the anti-human element!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's fist of fire puts Hordy down for the count, and the rest of the Straw Hats try to make short work of the remaining Fish-Man Pirates. Meanwhile, a very big boat looms overhead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the rest of the Straw Hats try to make short work of their enemies, Luffy summons the strength for one last brutal attack on Hordy. Now, about that giant boat…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After defeating Hordy, Luffy turns his attention to stopping the Noah from crushing Fish-Man Island. Straw Hats and Fish-Men alike watch as Luffy tries to obliterate a boat with a barrage of brutal blows!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fish-Man Island was saved by the timely arrival of the Sea Kings, but all is not well. Luffy lost a lot of blood in his battle with Hordy, and fish-to-human transfusions are strictly forbidden!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jimbei must decide whether or not to join the Straw Hats, and the grateful citizens of Fish-Man Island host a fabulous banquet in honor of their human heroes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew learn of epic battle between Aokiji and Akainu, a forgotten foe tries to kidnap the mermaid princess, and Hordy's gang finally gets what's coming to them!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji stumble upon a couple of Big Mam's henchmen extorting sweets from the peaceful people of Fish-Man Island, the Straw Hats make a new – and very powerful – enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats prepare to depart Fish-Man Island, a lion and a caribou come to blows over booby-trapped treasure, and Vice Admiral Smoker makes his presence felt in the New World!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew bid farewell to their new friends before setting off in search of the greatest adventures the New World has to offer!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Usopp's extreme deep sea fishing adventure lands the crew in the middle of a deadly whirlpool, but an unexpected encounter with a pod of giant whales may bail the Straw Hats out of hot water!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's arrival in the New World is marked by violent weather and the discovery of a tiny stowaway. When the Straw Hats agree to help their new friend, it could lead to big trouble with the Marines!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami hatches a plan to save Lily's father, but the arrival of an ex-marine madman throws a monkey wrench into the rescue mission.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Zoro find themselves locked in battle with their latest foes, but Nami's knowledge of the sea may be the key to escaping this scrum alive!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shuzo's squad of manned torpedoes targets the Straw Hats and the giants! The crazed captain tests Luffy's mettle in a showdown on land, but the wily pirate pulls off a supersized surprise in hopes to stomp out the madman for good

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A desperate cry for help leads the Straw Hats to Punk Hazard, an island engulfed in flames and inhabited by a mythic beast that could make short work of Luffy and the gang!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Zoro put their strength to the ultimate test in a battle with a dragon. Meanwhile, a band of mysterious intruders make their gassy presence felt aboard the Sunny!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy gets up close and personal with a torso-less Samurai! Elsewhere, Nami, Sanji, Chopper, and Franky find themselves imprisoned with the pieces of a human face!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes friends with a Centaur, Franky uses a cola-powered laser to break out of the clink, and Sanji takes a chance on a body-less Samurai!

programme.title: Mutant X

programme.title: Mutant X

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Mutant X must save the remaining members of an elite military unit, after a botched genetic experiment leaves them with New Mutant abilities.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash, Pablo and Kelly, now joined by Fisher, arrive at the survivalist camp in the midst of chaos and must go to extreme measures to escape. Meanwhile, more is revealed of Ruby's mission.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash attempts to bury the book to end the Evil, but first he must contend with other, more physical things from his past. Fisher faces a horrific change in Ash.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash battles someone all too familiar, and later hears a message from the Necronomicon. Meanwhile, the deadliest Deadite attacks.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: In a monumental, last-ditch attempt to rid the world of the Evil, Ash wages war against a Dark One. As the battle rages on, Ash is offered a deal that could completely change his life.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: The party in Jacksonville is over when Ash, Pablo, and Kelly are summoned by Ruby back to Ash's hometown to form an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Pablo's grasp on reality is tested when Ruby reveals the Necronomicon has gifted him with premonitions.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew must stop a world shipbuilder before he launches another invasion.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is kidnapped by Nietscheans and forced to play mind games for the amusement of his captors.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Two Nietzschean siblings are in a stand-off over a weapon that can eliminate higher brain functions. The crew steps in so neither can get the weapon.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr returns, having joined with the Collectors and demanding the Route of Ages from his former crewmates.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A hostage situation ensues when the crew confronts Tyr. Beka is rescued, Tyr is killed, and Trance reveals her true nature.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A wrong turn in the slipstream leads Andromeda to a prison riot. When the dust settles, they discover a prisoner missing.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Texas authorities have a killer riding the rails and leaving a literal trail of bread crumbs after eating at victims' tables; when more murders are linked, the FBI names a Most Wanted suspect and a national manhunt for The Railroad Killer ensues.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Minnesota police hunt for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness; no one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the summer of 1976, the NYPD are chasing a man shooting at couples in parked cars with a gigantic, .44 caliber handgun; he taunts the city with terrifying letters until police get a lead about a suspect who has shot a neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A rash of young men goes missing around Chicago during the 1970s; when bodies start washing up in the river, a pattern emerges; a small piece of evidence leads police to the home of a model citizen, where his furnace puts the suspect in the hot seat.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police find a string of murdered women in shallow graves in very remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness; after months of searching, police zero in on a local family man living a double life that no one suspects.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Numerous women are found dead by the side of the road with a unique ligature that looks like a dog collar and leash; detectives are stumped until a 17-year-old girl manages an escape from a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The I-5 corridor in California is taken over by a brazen bandit who terrorizes the highway with a blitz of assaults and murders; the only clue to the killer's identity is a specific athletic tape used to bind his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts Wichita, Kan., for decades by sending brazen letters and taking credit for horrific kills; at the introduction of the computer era, the killer gets sloppy and accidentally leaves a digital clue.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990s, Louisiana is terrorized by multiple serial killers; the Zachary Police Department discovers the key to solving their cases when a pattern emerges with personal items missing from each local victim.

programme.title: Oxygen True Crime Archives

programme.desc: Maggie returns from medical leave to help investigate two homicides: a law student on track to attend the FBI Academy and a young man with possible gang ties. An inadvertent revelation from Maggie causes OA to worry that she is rushing back into the job.

programme.desc: When a deadly truck heist arms the killers with enough ammonium nitrate to construct a massive bomb, the team discovers a link to a terrorist group Maggie is working to infiltrate.

programme.desc: Paris, January 1907. Albert Soleilland is accused of the rape and murder of a little girl – Marthe. The press details every step of the case as if it was a show.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1924 Hanover, the discovery of a hundred bones catches the authorities’ attention. The press covers the case and a suspect – Fritz Haarmann – is quickly arrested.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1929, seven members of Bugs Moran’s gang are assassinated in a garage by Al Capone’s henchmen.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In August 1933, Violette Nozière, 18, killed her father by poisoning in Paris. After a short period on the run, she was charged with murder and swiftly confessed to the crime, saying her motive was that he abused her.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On May 18th, 1936, Abe Sada killed her lover by “erotic asphyxia” then cut off his member and carved his name in her flesh. In a militarized Japan, the press was very interested in this crime with erotic and transgressive accents.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On 8 July 1947, the US Air Force announced the discovery of a “flying disc” which had crashed in the Roswell area of New Mexico. This was the birth of the flying saucer phenomenon.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On October 1972, an Uruguayan plane crashed into the Andes. 72 days later, 16 survivors are found! The incredible rescue fascinated the media across the world. How did they survive? An unspeakable truth gradually emerges: to survive.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: 1978 Guyana: Reverend Jim Jones holds an apocalyptic mass. Its outcome was the sacrifice of 918 members of the Peoples Temple – an American cult founded in the middle of the 1950s. The entire world was horrified by the journalists’ accounts.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On 31 August 1997, Princess Diana died alongside her companion, Dodi Al-Fayed, in a car crash in Paris, whilst being pursued by paparazzi. Her untimely death prompted an outpouring of grief in Britain and elsewhere in the world.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The first decade of the 1900s ushers in crucial inventions that will help shape the rest of the century. Communication gets a boost as a voice is transmitted wirelessly by radio for the first time.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Saving lives and taking lives are the hallmarks of the inventions of the 1910s. From charcoal to lightly browned.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Though overshadowed by the Great Depression, there is no shortage of ingenuity in the 1930s. The two-way radio gets miniaturized, and the world's first portable walkie-talkie goes on the air.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: War is the driving force behind much of the innovation in the 1940s. The microwave is born after a self-taught inventor realizes that military equipment is responsible for melting a chocolate bar in his pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1950s heralds the end of vacuum tubes and the rise of mobile technologies when two Japanese inventors shrink cabinet-size radios down to something small enough to fit in your pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: In 1976 a packed coach crashed into the Amazon killing 39 people. When the bodies were pulled out, some had been so viciously mutilated by Piranhas that they could only be identified by their clothes. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates the Piranha.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: In the deep South is a fish reputed to have committed a series of violent attacks on humans. This creature is said to be as vicious as a shark and big as a 'gator. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade heads to Texas to reveal the truth about the Alligator Gar.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: A man swallowed whole by a fish, a body eaten alive from within. Another penetrated in a most unnatural fashion, yet more with multiple stab wounds. Jeremy Wade is in pursuit of some of the Amazon's most notorious flesh eaters.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: No fish inspires the same terror as the shark. A creature with an insatiable hunger for brutal violence. But at least these killers are confined to the oceans. Or are they? Expert angler Jeremy Wade investigates the deadly Bullshark.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to The Mekong River in Thailand in search of one of the world's largest, most terrifying river fish, the Giant Freshwater Stingray. Armed with a venomous 10-inch barbed tail, this 700-pound monster tests Jeremy to his physical limit.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to one of the few rivers left on earth that will still test a fisherman. The Congo, a river steeped in legends, and soaked in violence. One spirit, in particular, is said to lure fishermen from their boats to their deaths.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler, Jeremy Wade, searches for the lethal lake monster of native legend that's been dragging people down to an icy grave for centuries. Jeremy ends up landing the largest fish he's ever caught, but is this the monster?

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a quest to Africa's Rift Valley, to explore the roots of fishing and the monsters these first fishermen faced. A dangerous place, with killer crocs, hippos and warring gangs, but at its heart is a worthy prize: the Mputa, Aka Nile Perch.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade journeys to the infamous Congo River in Africa in search of the world's most ferocious fish. This supernatural monster predator pushes Jeremy to his physical and mental limits. It requires all of his skills and the help of a witch doctor.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on the trail of a mysterious man-eater described over two hundred years ago by a famous explorer. Is the eight-foot beast in question a mere legend, or could it be the same, flesh and blood creature that has attacked divers and children?

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Paraná River in the remote corner of Argentina to investigate the death of a young girl. This creature is not armed with bone crunching jaws or razor sharp teeth but a razor-sharp blade tipped with tissue destroying venom.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Brazil's 'wild west' in search of a river monster that has killed three cowboys. Jeremy finally corners his elusive prey in the most unexpected place. All he has to do then is catch it, without getting killed.

programme.title: Yukon Men
programme.desc: Trapping season is underway, but record-low snowfall has made fur scarce and villagers are forced to adapt. Charlie and Bob go after a bear in its den.

programme.title: Yukon Men
programme.desc: The lack of snow is making trails impassable. Joey sets a new trap line that brings him face to face with a vicious predator. James struggles with a wood shortage.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers venture back to the notorious vault auction, this time in Chattsworth, CA. Jarrod and Brandi find something that makes noise, if not money. Barry Weiss uses "the force."

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to the northern part of Southern California, Oxnard. Barry Weiss finds a room with a view. Dave Hester's looking for gold, and finds bronze. Jarrod battles Dave, along with a nasty cold.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Coal Miner's Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels back to West Virginia to investigate recent recordings of possible bigfoot howls. With the help of a radio show, the team reaches out to witnesses from across the state and rafts deep into the holler in hopes of finding a bigfoot.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: 1, 2, 3, 4, I Declare a Squatch War
programme.desc: The team travels back to the Pacific Northwest to determine the squatchiest state in the U.S. With the team evenly divided and a friendly wager made, Bobo and Cliff head to Oregon while Matt and Ranae head to Washington to see which state is squatchier.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Bigfoot Call of the Wildman
programme.desc: The investigators travel once more to the state of Kentucky to inspect some recent casts of bigfoot tracks. After a wild night with Ernie the Turtleman, they have a terrifying night of their own using Louisville Sluggers for knockers.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The verdict is in for two new pieces of evidence found deep in the Money Pit. Both are ancient and each may be proof of theories that could rewrite the history of the Oak Island mystery.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: New evidence confirms a European presence on Oak Island 100 years before the discovery of the Money Pit, while new research suggests a clear pathway from the Knights Templar to Oak Island.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: A research expedition to a French castle and prison reveals new clues, including ancient carvings that strengthen a possible link between the Knights Templar and Oak Island.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The team unearths a ship's log detailing the burial of treasure on an island eerily similar to Oak Island, and Rick and Gary make what may prove to be the biggest find on Oak Island, ever.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Further investigation suggests a link between the mysterious medieval cross and the Knights Templar.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: A skeleton key and maps from Fred Nolan's archives open a new door in the Lagina's quest, while new evidence suggests a Templar connection to the lead cross found in Smith's Cove.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The plot thickens around the discovery of the lead cross as a new theory points to possible ancient origins. Rick pulls an artifact from the swamp that may support one of Fred Nolan's theories.

programme.title: Dual Survival
programme.desc: Joe and Matt battle dehydration and altitude in the Bolivian Andes.

programme.title: Dual Survival

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre rebelde intenta despistar a los oficiales. Un conductor bien vestido quiebra barricadas. Los oficiales se sorprenden cuando una llamada doméstica da un giro inesperado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Viendo una buena oportunidad un sospechoso va a las carreras. Se atrapa a un hombre con objetos desagradables. Se atrapa a un hombre en una operación encubierta, aun así, no admite su crimen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía intenta atrapar a un sospechoso por robo de vehículo armado. La policía llega a una escena caótica y un testigo aclara las cosas. Un ciclista rezongón culpa su forma de ser en animé.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Alguien con un corazón roto maneja peligrosamente. Se atrapa a un miembro de la Asociación de padres y maestros dando un mal ejemplo. Seguir adelante es difícil para una mujer con un pasado malo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Es como una reunión cuando la policía alcanza a alguien que reconoce. La amante de un hombre hace problemas con la esposa. Los oficiales batallan con dos sospechosos que no dan respuestas concretas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre buscado huye y la policía va muy cerca detrás de él. La policía persigue a una persona manejando nerviosamente. Un retén arriesga a un auto lleno de gente que tiene mucho que ocultar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales se ven obligados a usar guantes cuando detienen a un sospechoso asustado con una condición grave de la piel. Un futuro papá trata de correr. Un rapero empieza a cantar cuando lo esposan.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se somete a un hombre que está convencido que un animal salvaje lo sigue. Un cumpleaños se descontrola rápidamente cuando se involucran las armas. La policía ayuda con un problema domestico volátil.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un barrio tranquilo se interrumpe. Un hombre desafortunado trata de ocultar su culpabilidad al tirar unas prendas. Hay puñetazos cuando un dueño de tienda enfrenta a alguien que le robó.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía encuentra más que golosinas en el bolsillo de un sospechoso. Un conductor armado da un relato no creíble para justificar su arma. Una discusión termina con una llamada a Control Animal.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre llama a la policía cuando ve un robo en la licorería. Un conductor pierde a su amiga cuando le roba su camioneta. Los oficiales le sugieren a un joven que sea mejor ejemplo para su hermano.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía evita un allanamiento posiblemente mortal en una casa. Un pasajero tenso empieza a rezongar antes de que los oficiales digan una palabra. La policía busca la bicicleta robada de un joven.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales persiguen a un ciclista casi desnudo por todo el vecindario. Un sospechoso hace una serie de movimientos equivocados frente a su novia. La policía encuentra a una mujer en un armario.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor quiere regresar a casa para un cumpleaños. Un hombre teme confesar por qué sus huellas están en un arma. Un viaje para comprar comida de perro se convierte en un encuentro con la policía.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor atrevido causa una persecución loca. Un pollero tiene una explicación poco clara de los objetos descubiertos en su carro. Un hombre impulsivo no reconocer sus errores fácilmente.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso que conduce ebrio dice que sólo salió a comprar un bocadillo. Una pareja se delata cuando la policía hace preguntas. La policía detiene a alguien que cree que se le tendió una trampa.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre intenta pelear con todo el vecindario. Un fugitivo está convencido de que la policía le dijo que se fuera en su bicicleta. Una mamá joven con problemas tiene una segunda oportunidad.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un motociclista causa una persecución por las calles. Ni un carro que no prende impide que un hombre corra de la policía. Un conductor no logra evadir a la policía y se disculpa raramente con su novia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Durante una parada de tránsito un sospechoso decide huir a campo través. Una mujer rehúsa mentir por el amigo de su hijo. Se captura en video a un hombre escondiendo artículos en un lugar obvio.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: El último esfuerzo para huir de la policía termina en llamas. Varias unidades se unen para acabar con una situación peligrosa. La policía vigila una batalla de custodia conllevando comestibles caros.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Unas placas raras ayudan a prevenir un robo. Una pelea por un amor no correspondido se torna violenta. La policía detiene a un hombre sin ropa por un presunto incendio provocado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se desmiente a un sospechoso cuando su víctima presenta un video de seguridad. El miedo le gana a un conductor cuando trata de escapar. Un viaje de noche al mercado termina en llanto.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una pelea entre hermanos se intensifica cuando uno saca un arma. Un hombre viola la orden de restricción con su exnovia y esto le trae consecuencias. Los oficiales aconsejan a una mujer que quiere tener mejor control sobre su vida.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso intenta negociar su arresto. El caos sigue cuando el gerente del club nocturno se enfrenta al empleado que robó su dinero. Un hombre insiste en ser ser arrestado.

programme.desc: Una noche familiar de ver fútbol termina en una pelea. Un ladrón acaba con la buena voluntad de la policía al encontrarlo con artículos robados. Un hombre admite no poder escapar de la policía al ser atrapado.

programme.desc: Odo is caught in the middle when an alien influence pits Kira against Sisko in a deadly power struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kira is forced to re-examine her post-occupation prejudices about Cardassians when her running battle of wits with a jailed man claiming to be a notorious death camp leader is actually his remorseful file clerk.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When a Bajoran spiritual leader objects to Keiko's secular teachings, she threatens to destroy the alliance between Bajor and the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kira risks her life, and war with the Cardassians, to rescue a mythical Bajoran hero from a distant prison colony.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Relieved of her post and sent back to Bajor, Kira helps to reveal the hidden force behind The Circle—and a greater secret that could destroy them all.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: While Sisko leads a daring last stand against the Bajoran takeover forces, Kira and Dax embark on a desperate mission to reveal the truth about the coup.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The crew must fight for Jadzia's life when a desperate Trill takes the group hostage and steals the Dax symbiont.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A young Cardassian, orphaned in the war and raised by Bajorans, causes turmoil on the station when his people attempt to reclaim him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: After falling in love with a woman whose species is unable to walk in "normal" gravity, Bashir develops a technology that could free her of her wheelchair forever.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A Ferengi female, defying the law and disguising herself as a male, risks it all when she falls in love with Quark.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew is haunted by vivid images of a battle they don't remember fighting.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Killing for sport becomes Seven's only means of survival when she is abducted into a ring of fisticuffs.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Claiming to be a long-dead crewmember, an alien requests asylum on Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew must rescue a young boy being used as a weapon of destruction against the Borg

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway must tend to her flock when she finds three misfit crewmembers need some special attention.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Impostors jeopardize Voyager's good reputation in the Delta Quadrant.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Stranded during an away mission, B'Elanna finds herself the inspiration for a young poet's art.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: An old friend returns with a decidedly unfriendly plot to destroy Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor seizes an opportunity to save the life of the man who created him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix recounts the harrowing tale of Voyager's newest uninvited guest.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Captain Janeway faces her biggest battle yet against the Borg—assimilation.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: An astronomer and a comedian discuss what the James Webb learned about early galaxies.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson, his co-hosts, and an astrophysicist explore simulations, black holes, and warp drive.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the situation onboard the Destiny dire, General O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and Homeworld Command order Col. Young to execute a high-risk plan concocted by the IOA scientists which, in theory, could return the crew to Earth.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After making a surprising discovery on a jungle planet, members of the team become ill. In an attempt to isolate the infection, the team sets up camp in the jungle. But when night falls, the illness will be the least of their worries.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 journeys to a planet where their arrival ignites a war between two cultures. A spy realizes his side could win the war if SG-1 and the Stargate can be neutralized. Will O'Neill and his team make the same realization and save themselves in time?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Bra'tac (Tony Amendola) arrives at Stargate Command with a wild story about interplanetary warfare with Apophis (Peter Williams). Daniel deduces that the battle is over Apophis' child, and races to save the child before Apophis can find him first.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel finds a crystal skull identical to one first discovered by his grandfather. When Daniel stares into the skull's eyes, a force makes him disappear. Now SG-1 must find his grandfather to unlock the mystery of the skull and bring Daniel home.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill is kidnapped by the Asgard and encounters a swarm of vicious metallic bug-like creatures on a mission to destroy Earth. O'Neill plans to blow up the ship and sacrifice himself, but can the team find another way to stop this apocalyptic plan?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 is called upon to help a race of gentle, highly-intelligent aliens struggling against a swarm of deadly mechanical spiders called Replicators. But the situation becomes much more complicated when a lone Replicator is discovered back on Earth.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 responds to a cry for help from a doomed civilization, which promises to give Earthlings access to advanced technology in exchange for supplies that would help them defeat their enemies. But they soon discover that SG-1 may not be helping.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 is selected to test the effects of alien-tech wristbands on human wearers, and soon find themselves blessed with spectacular strength and speed. But when they are sent on a mission utilizing these new abilities, they learn a shocking lesson.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a High Priestess from the planet Chulak claims to have a plan that would cripple the Goa'uld, everyone is skeptical. SG-1 must join forces with the Tok'ra in order to put her plan into effect, but a deadly, hidden secret could jeopardize it.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When an SGC soldier under the influence of a Goa'uld mind-control device attempts to assassinate a High Council member, SG-1 must uncover other potential assassins, even amongst themselves, before the president arrives for a crucial Summit meeting!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After a visit to a strange planet in the middle of a geomagnetic storm they find themselves repeating the same day over and over again. The team must utilize their accumulated knowledge to stop the time loop before there are disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 joins forces with a Russian scientist to investigate a rogue Stargate in Siberia, linked to a mysterious water planet. The team must venture via submarine to the water planet, where they encounter an unexpectedly terrifying alien presence.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During an archaeological survey of fossils on a Goa'uld planet, Daniel is abducted by a fearsome creature, prompting SG-1 to embark on a mission to free him. But Daniel soon learns that the creature's intentions are not what he thought!

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When the mythic Gods, the Titans, are released and kill all the elders, Leo is forced to take over. Meanwhile, a mysterious Whitelighter from the future guides the Charmed Ones when Leo gives the girls the ultimate power to vanquish the Titans.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Sisters Prue (Shannen Doherty) and Piper (Holly Marie Combs) Halliwell have recently moved into their dead grandmother’s old Victorian home in the San Francisco hills and when youngest, black-sheep sister Phoebe (Alyssa Milano) moves in with them.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A good-looking man, Stefan (guest-star Michael Philip) actually kidnaps young, beautiful women and sucks their youth and beauty out of them to keep his own youth now he has designs on Phoebe (Alyssa Milano).

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Halliwell sisters’ long-lost father unexpectedly turns up and has intentions of getting the Book of Shadows out of their house; simultaneously, mysterious new neighbors move in across the street with intentions of their own.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After being killed by Asian gang thugs, Mark (guest star John Cho) becomes a ghost whose soul is up for grabs depending upon if Yama (guest star Rex Peterson), the demon who confiscates souls for hell gets him first.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper (Holly Marie Combs) and Phoebe (Alyssa Milano) cast a spell to dream up romantic interests, the dream sorcerer (guest star Matt Schulze) tries to get back at Prue (Shannen Doherty) after she rebuffs him at a nightclub.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Piper caters a wedding with Phoebe’s help and discovers that Elliot, the groom (Todd Corteil) under a spell by Jade, the bride and is forced to marry her instead of his true love, Allison

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A young and lonely teen (guest star Danielle Harris) attempts to get friendly with the sisters after being possessed by Kali (guest star Rebecca Carlton), a demon bent on gaining the girls’ powers from them.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After a warlock from the future comes to the present to destroy the people who will eventually create a vaccine against warlocks, Prue casts a 24-hour truth spell in order to determine if Andy finds out she’s a witch, will he still be attracted to her.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Rex (Neil Roberts) gets Prue (Shannen Doherty) a locket that harbors the evil warlock Matthew (guest star Matthew Tate), Matthew takes Prue’s powers and sets out for the other sisters.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Rex (guest star Neil Roberts) and Hannah (guest star Leigh- Allyn Baker) set out to destroy the sisters Halliwell and frame Prue (Shannen Doherty) for murder while angering her by Rex dating Phoebe (Alyssa Milano).

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe’s old flame Clay comes to town after he and his partners steal a valuable urn that is guarded by a demon, putting Prue in jeopardy after Clay gets Phoebe to ask Prue to help sell the urn.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper is almost killed by a beast, she notices a strange transformation she begins to make – all similar traits to her attacker. Meanwhile, Phoebe works as Prue’s assistant and tries to help a family reunite after a premonition.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Castaways' spirits are drowning in a relentless rain storm, but a fun challenge reward offers a few players a glimpse into the Cambodian culture. Also, the "voting block" strategy used this season continues to keep Castaways on their toes.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Emotions run deep when loved ones visit the island, and a desperate reward challenge leaves castaways' heads spinning. Also, exhaustion takes a serious toll on one castaway in the middle of an immunity battle.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: The castaways scramble to solidify a plan for the final three. Also, a frightening incident at the immunity challenge sends shockwaves through the entire tribe, and castaways are rewarded with a spiritual recharge at the temples of Cambodia.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Six castaways battle it out for a shot in the final three, and a shocking tribal council delivers a Survivor first. Later, the final three castaways plead their cases for the $1 million prize, on the two-hour season finale.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: The castaways reunite in Los Angeles to discuss the season. Jeff Probst hosts.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Castaways embark on the most grueling 39 days in Survivor history and test whether brute strength, looks or smarts will be the attribute that helps capture the title of Sole Survivor.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: One castaway goes to great heights to retrieve an idol, and on the beauty tribe, two castaways become quick friends. Also, immunity and rewards are on the line at a taxing physical challenge.

programme.title: Survivor

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: The brutal heat of Kaoh Rong takes a toll on several castaways, and one is medically evacuated from of the game.

programme.title: Survivor

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: A hearty food reward is up for grabs at a classic challenge. Also, the pressure is on when one castaway interrogates a fellow tribemate,

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: A Tribe merge reshuffles the game and its alliances. Also, a brutal individual immunity challenge keeps castaways on their toes.

programme.title: Survivor

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and friends keep defeating all his ghosts, Betrayus, with the help of the demented Dr. Buttocks, decides to clone an army of Netherworld monsters. Lucky for Pac, one little monster isn't really a monster at heart.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks amps up the stakes by inventing the Molecular Magnifier to create gigantic Monsters. Meanwhile, Pac adopts the little monster that saved his life, but he's in for more trouble than he bargained for.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and his pals get blasted into the past, he not only finally meets his parents -- and his Baby Pac self – but has an adventure with them during PacWorld War I.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld Kingpin Obtuse is working for Betrayus and uses Skeebo to try and steal Pac's power berries, but the plan backfires when Skeebo uses the berries to turn himself into the super-powered Heebo-Skeebo.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus steals the Repository of the ghosts' corporeal bodies, but not before Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde nab one body to share between them. Then it's up to Pac, Cyli and Spiral to get the Repository back from the Netherworld...

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Sir Cumference tries to show that he is more than just an old scientist, he's still got it as a freedom fighter – but after some disastrous attempts, it soon becomes clear that he isn't quite the fighter he used to be.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is becoming dangerously hot and its citizens mistakenly blame Sir C! Pac and Friends remain loyal to the elderly inventor and, together; they uncover a plot by Betrayus to terra-form PacWorld into a world just like the Netherworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The annual Pacolympics approach and allow for Aunt Spheria to reignite a Pac-Pong rivalry with her former Pac-Pong rival and wanna-be suitor - Lord Betrayus. Let the games begin!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: An ancient artifact once belonging to Pac's parent's leads to a temple within a maze that may hold the secret to the Tree of Life.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac fails his driver's license test because of a ridiculously strict Hovering Vehicles Department employee, Mr. Strickler. Then, to save Pac-World, Pac has to fly the Paccerchini into the Netherworld,

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: It looks like Betrayus' fortunes are changing when he summons a Nether-Witch to curse Pac Man with bad luck. The only catch is, the witch will only turn over the potion if Betrayus promises to marry her.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks lures a giant Ghosteroidto threaten PacWorld, and Pac-Man must grow to planet proportions to save the day. But who's gonna save Planet Pac from the repercussions of his enlargement?

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pinky is so jealous of Pac's friendship with Cyli, she tries to get rid of her rival.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Dr. Buttocks gets a map leading to the ancient, lost city of PacLantis, Pac, Cyli and Spiral voyage to the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Once every 100 Halloweens, the two moons of PacWorld turn blue, so Betrayus summons the sinister Count Pacula to drain the last Yellow Orb in PacWorld - namely Pac-Man!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The diabolical Dr. Buttocks clones an army of radio controlled prehistoric Pacasaursto attack Pacworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: In order to learn the secret location of the Repository, Betrayus possesses his mother's body while Dr.Buttocks hypnotizes the President.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When a super gigantic Robot invades Pacopolis, wielding a weapon that renders the power berries powerless, Pac-Man faces the ultimate challenge and nearly succumbs to doubts that without the berries he is not really a hero.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: There's a new threat to PacWorld, a debonair spy ghost named Specter. To stop him, Pac gets help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus steals the Repository of the ghosts' corporeal bodies, but not before Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde nab one body to share between them. Then it's up to Pac, Cyli and Spiral to get the Repository back from the Netherworld...

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Sir Cumference tries to show that he is more than just an old scientist, he's still got it as a freedom fighter – but after some disastrous attempts, it soon becomes clear that he isn't quite the fighter he used to be.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber opens up about a new romantic connection, Cory worries about leaving Ryder while he's on The Challenge, and Mackenzie says goodbye to her mom.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber's boyfriend Dimitri comes to visit, Cheyenne prepares Ryder for pre-school while Cory is on The Challenge, and Maci debates letting Bentley apply to private school.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne rushes Ryder to the hospital, Amber arranges for Dimitri to take a lie detector test, and a grief-stricken Mackenzie takes a business trip to Florida.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci asks Taylor to have a talk with Bentley about respecting girls, Catelynn meets with an organic baby food company in New York, and Cheyenne is anxious about Cory's return.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne helps Cory and Taylor plan their gender-reveal party, Mackenzie works to be more organized for her kids, and Amber introduces Dimitri to her protective brother.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Mackenzie and her family help each other heal, Cheyenne worries about how Ryder will adjust to having a half-sister, and Catelynn and Tyler look into gender selection.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber is shocked when Gary asks her to move onto his property. Catelynn pursues a career in microblading while Mackenzie accepts a job opportunity in Florida. Bentley starts therapy and Maci is heartbroken when she finds out he feels neglected.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: When Mackenzie's father needs to have quadruple bypass surgery, her plans to move to Florida are put on pause. Maci worries about Bentley's performance in school while Catelynn and Tyler contemplate having another child.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci helps Bentley decide if he should go to his brother, Jagger's birthday since Ryan will be there. Catelynn and Tyler work on discipling Nova while Amber makes a decision about living on Gary's property.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn believes she's pregnant while Maci deals with a change in venue for Jagger's birthday party which puts Bentley in an awkward position. Cheyenne considers buying a new house with Zach.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber deals with online trolls who criticize her weight while Catelynn receives her microblading certification and looks into opening her own studio. To raise awareness during PCOS month, Maci accepts a challenge from Taylor.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: After discovering that a staff member at Nova's old daycare is a sex offender, Catelynn and Tyler decide to talk to Nova about protecting herself. Mackenzie struggles starting her new job in Florida and taking care of the kids without Josh.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Zach's families pressure them to get married while Mackenzie and Josh give their marriage another chance in Florida. For the first time ever, Catelynn and Tyler decide to vote in the Presidential Election.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne shocks Cory with her pregnancy news. Amber struggles when her dog's health is deteriorates and Catelynn and Tyler are concerned that Nova might have a learning disability. Mackenzie celebrates her 26th birthday.
